name: Lemon Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 1/2 red bell pepper, cut into matchstick slices
1/2 green bell pepper, cut into matchstick slices
1/4 red onion, cut into matchstick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first 11 ingredients and whisk to blend.
2. Refrigerate the dressing until cold. It can be prepared up to one day in advance.
3. In another large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, red bell pepper, green bell pepper, red onion, carrot, chopped fresh parsley, and grated lemon peel.
4. Toss with enough dressing to season to taste.
5. Serve immediately.
